data.title: Continental Battery Systems Selected by Mazda as Nationwide Battery Partner Across U.S. Dealer Network
data.description: In Dallas, CBS has announced Mazda’s choice of supplier for its U.S. batteries. This decision is set to provide reliable solutions, nationwide distribution, and dedicated dealer support to fuel growth for Mazda.

data.title: CMES Robotics USA and Engineering Innovation to Showcase AI-Powered Parcel Handling Solution at MODEX 2026
data.description: A new automated system for picking pieces from gaylords and transferring them to conveyors will make its debut live in Atlanta. Developed by CMES Robotics USA and Engineering Innovation (EII), the AI-powered parcel handling solution will be featured at MODEX 2026 from April 13-16 at booth B15732. This advanced system aims to streamline operations and enhance efficiency in handling parcels, marking a significant advancement in logistics technology. Don't miss the chance to witness this cutting-edge technology in action at the event.

data.title: PROENERGY Closes Agreement with South Texas Electric Cooperative to Divest Braes Bayou and Brotman Generating Stations
data.description: PROENERGY has recently finalized a deal to sell off the Braes Bayou and Brotman Generating Stations located in the ERCOT market to South Texas Electric. The facilities will continue to be maintained under PROENERGY's Lifecycle Care agreements. This transaction, conducted on April 10, 2026, signifies a strategic move in the energy sector.

data.title: National Humanities Center Announces Lineup for 2026 "Being Human" Festival (US)
data.description: Several events will take place in various communities throughout the United States from April 17 to May 3, 2026. These include an interactive theater performance and craft workshop in Kansas, a public art and activism party in Washington D.C., and a hands-on exploration of New Orleans' funeral customs. The activities aim to engage and entertain attendees, providing unique cultural experiences. This initiative offers a diverse range of happenings, catering to different interests within each community.

data.title: Strobes Security Unveils Proprietary AI Harness Powering End-to-End Penetration Testing
data.description: A Plano, Texas-based company, Strobes, has unveiled a new AI Harness designed for Exposure Management. This innovative technology enables the compression of full-scope pentest engagements from weeks to less than 48 hours. The system utilizes multi-agent orchestration with human-in-the-loop oversight to achieve this remarkable acceleration in testing time. This advancement marks a significant reduction in the duration of pentest engagements and showcases the potential for increased efficiency in security testing processes.

data.title: Chandrasoma Medical, a New Pulmonary and Primary Care Practice, offers Pasadena a Concierge Choice
data.description: A newly opened private medical practice in Rockville Centre, New York is providing personalized and comprehensive healthcare services. This practice offers more time, convenience, and fosters a closer doctor-patient relationship. Concierge Choice Physicians (CCP) is the country's top full-service concierge medical service and is leading this initiative. The practice aims to deliver individualized care and enhance patient experience by allowing for more time with doctors, convenient services, and closer physician-patient connections. Patients can expect tailored healthcare services and a more personalized approach to their medical needs at this new practice location in Rockville Centre, New York.

data.title: CENTENE CORPORATION TO HOST 2026 FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS EARNINGS CALL
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Centene Corporation, a prominent healthcare company (NYSE: CNC), announced it will reveal its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 at around 6:00 a.m. ET on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. This disclosure is eagerly anticipated by investors and industry analysts to gauge the company's performance during the initial months of the year. The information will provide insights into Centene's financial health and strategic direction. Stakeholders are keenly awaiting this report to assess the company's trajectory and make informed decisions about their investments.

data.title: The Impact Forum, Co-Founded by Adam and Gila Milstein, Raises Over $1.1 Million at Miami Beach Dinner to Combat Antisemitism and Support Israel
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida on April 10, 2026, the Impact Forum, founded by Adam and Gila Milstein, brought together 175 philanthropists for their biannual gathering. The aim was to provide funding for nonprofits dedicated to combating antisemitism, promoting American values, and assisting Israeli families impacted by war.

data.title: Pendulum Therapeutics Expands Clinical Collaboration to Advance Microbiome Research in Women's Health and Dermatology
data.description: On April 10, 2026, Pendulum Therapeutics, a leading biotechnology company focused on microbiome science for enhancing human health, revealed an extended clinical research partnership with Mayo Clinic. This collaboration aims to investigate novel uses of microbiome-based interventions in healthcare.

data.title: First-Time Homebuyers in Texas Remain Near an All-Time Low
data.description: The Texas Realtors report reveals that the majority of buyers in Texas are older individuals who have previously owned homes, with a growing trend of paying in cash. In 2025, first-time buyers made up only 21% of all homebuyers in Texas, which is close to the historical low of 20%. This indicates a shift towards experienced buyers in the market.
